name: Tax Filing Assistant
description: Prepare federal income taxes — document collection, calculation, PDF generation, and guided filing. Federal returns only (no state). Supports 1040, Schedules 1/C/D/SE, Form 8889, and common credits.
author: Crow

env_vars.name: CROW_TAX_DB_PATH
env_vars.description: Path to tax data database (defaults to Crow's main DB)

env_vars.name: CROW_TAX_ENCRYPTION_KEY
env_vars.description: Passphrase for encrypting PII at rest (SSN, names). Set on first use.

notes: Federal returns only — no state income tax support. Supports MFJ, Single, HoH filing. 2025 tax year. Generates filled IRS PDFs ready to mail and step-by-step guided filing instructions. PII is encrypted at rest. Not a substitute for professional tax advice.
